01 / 05

Arya & Federico

Lake Como, Italy · June 2025

When a supermodel married her Italian Stallion on a horse ranch outside Milan, it was so dreamy they had two weddings. That Aalap on "Fools Rush In"? Absolute goosebumps.

Watch Film
02 / 05

Priya & Akshay

Hyderabad, India · December 2024

Someone somewhere is made for you, but you have to open your heart to love like Priya and Akshay did. Love is not about finding the perfect person.

Watch Film
03 / 05

Apoorva & Kshitij

Uttarakhand · March 2025

Intimate, honest, filmed with a small crew, big hearts, and open skies. Somewhere between sunlight and song, we were reminded why we love what we do.

Watch Film
04 / 05

Nikki & Vishal

India · March 2025

Now I know what it truly means to have a Wedding Filmer film — to feel it all over again. The love from our crew, friends, and family was overwhelming.

Watch Film
05 / 05

Faiz & Fajr

Bangalore · January 2014

Come and witness the Divine in this soul-stirring Eid film. A timeless piece that started it all and proved that wedding films can be pure cinema.

Watch Film

TWF Around the World

Where we've travelled

From intimate ceremonies in Goa to grand celebrations in Italy — across 40+ countries and 5 continents, Jonna Films has captured love in every form.

Every frame is a testament: nothing is ever lost to us as long as we remember it.

— Jonna Thomas, Founder

TWF Music Label

Original
Compositions

"Creating music that makes you feel."

Jonna Films label was born out of a need for music that truly captures the emotion of a wedding. Every track is written, composed, and produced to tell a story that transcends culture and language.

From the haunting notes of Ik Onkar to the gentle longing of Tu Mila — these are songs that have made brides cry, grooms speechless, and families cherish their memories forever.

Notes of Gratitude

What Our Couples Say

★★★★★

"It is pure beauty!! I watched it twice in a day and cried both times. You were right in how much thought, consideration and work has gone into making the movie."

Aayush & Suman
TWF Groom · Mexico
★★★★★

"Vishal, the video is amazing! Love every second and the music — it's so memorable and made me cry! Thank you for capturing such special moments."

PV Sindhu
Indian Badminton Champion · Udaipur
★★★★★

"Vishal, this is so so beautiful. Shlok and I watched it, and we felt so special and emotional. Thank you so much for adding your magic to it."

Muskan Singhaniya
TWF Bride
★★★★★

"Thank you so much for capturing such special moments. We cried every single time we watched it! Jonna Films truly brings your love story to life."

Mahek Singh
